c.d: Effectiveness and randomness of the shuffle mode, including features like prevention of repeated songs and real random number generation
c.s: REAL Shuffle Player, Spotify, Sonos App

c.d: Ability to create, manage, and synchronize playlists and folders for music playback
c.s: REAL Shuffle Player, Spotify, Shuffle Music

c.d: User friendliness and adaptability of the app interface across different devices
Support for streaming music from cloud services and platforms like YouTube, OneDrive, and Google Drive
Incorporation of AI or algorithms for personalized music selection and discovery when shuffling playlists
Capability to cast music to other devices such as Fire TV, Chromecast, and support integration with various music ecosystems
Popularity and user satisfaction metrics including average star rating and download count
